Atty. GREGORY W. PATTERSON, Esq. of Law Offices of Gregory W. Patterson (Tel: 310-376-0010) for plaintiff (via Zoom videoconference);
Attys. JAMES N. KRAMER, Esq. and SUNNY HWANG, Esq. of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP (Tel: 415-773-5700) for defendant Brex Inc. (Mr. Hwang via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BREX INC.'s Motion To File Under Seal Documents In Support Of Motion To Dismiss Or Stay For Improper Forum.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar as parties stipulated to the sealing of records on September 16, 2022.

Attys. JAMES N. KRAMER, Esq. and SUNNY HWANG, Esq. of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP (Tel: 415-773-5700) for defendant Brex Inc. (Mr. Hwang via Zoom videoconference).
